name: workflow state contract validator accepts a state file with all section 2.15 required fields
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"session_id":"s1","current_phase":"plan","feature_description":"x","architect_session":{"decisions":[]},"spec_path":null,"plan_approved_at":null,"commits":[],"branch_recommendations":[],"standards_consulted":[],"pr_corpus_consulted":[],"compliance_consulted":[],"_resumable":true}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/validate-state-contract.sh" --state .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'valid=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
